<!-- source-hash: 0edb7b222fa265b9797c30f441fd76a5 -->
Handles HTTP request proxying to integrated tools, resolving target URLs, injecting authentication headers, and forwarding responses back to the caller.

## Key Components

**`proxyApiRequest(String toolId, HttpServletRequest request, String body)`**
Entry point for all proxied requests. Validates the tool exists and is enabled, resolves the target URI via `ProxyUrlResolver`, builds auth headers, and delegates to `proxy()`.

**`buildApiRequestHeaders(IntegratedTool tool)`**
Constructs outbound headers including `Content-Type`, `Accept`, and authentication. Supports three `APIKeyType` modes:
- `HEADER` — injects a custom key/value header pair
- `BEARER_TOKEN` — adds an `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- `NONE` — no auth header added

**`proxy(IntegratedTool tool, URI targetUri, String method, Map<String, String> proxyHeaders, String body)`**
Executes the HTTP request using Apache HttpClient 5, attaches headers and optional body, and maps the downstream response (status code + body) directly into a `ResponseEntity<String>`.

**`createHttpRequest(String method, URI uri)`**
Factory method mapping HTTP method strings (`GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `OPTIONS`) to their corresponding Apache `HttpUriRequestBase` subclasses.

**`createHttpClient()`**
Configures a shared `CloseableHttpClient` with a 10-second connection timeout and a 60-second response timeout.

## Usage Example

```java
// Called internally by a controller handling /tools/{toolId}/**
ResponseEntity<String> response = restProxyService.proxyApiRequest(
    "zabbix",       // registered tool key
    httpServletRequest,
    "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"host.get\"}" // raw JSON body
);
```

The service looks up the tool by key, resolves its registered API URL, injects the configured credentials, and returns the upstream response transparently to the caller.
